context: Tests two complementary placement rules on a Horizon theme: (1) FAQ answer text must not contain <code> HTML tags — the Horizon FAQ is built with an 'accordion' block whose '_accordion-row' rows hold 'text' blocks, and the 'richtext' setting type rejects <code> tags, so <strong> should be used for emphasis instead; and (2) pre-order/pre-launch messaging belongs on the tier product template via a 'custom-liquid' section placed before the main 'product-information' section, not embedded in the homepage template.

checklist.name: No <code> tags in FAQ answer text
checklist.description: The FAQ accordion's answer text blocks in templates/index.json contain NO or tags in their richtext content

checklist.name: Strong used for emphasis in FAQ
checklist.description: At least one FAQ answer text block uses <strong> tags for emphasis (instead of <code>) when highlighting technical terms, commands, or key phrases

checklist.name: Pre-order message on product template
checklist.description: templates/product.subscription.json exists and contains a 'custom-liquid' section with pre-order ship date messaging (contains 'ships' or 'pre-order' or 'pre order' text)

checklist.name: Pre-order on product template before main
checklist.description: In templates/product.subscription.json, the pre-order custom-liquid section appears before the main 'product-information' section in the 'order' array

checklist.name: No pre-order message on homepage
checklist.description: templates/index.json does NOT contain 'ships November 15' or other pre-order ship date copy in its sections — the homepage is clean of pre-order messaging

checklist.name: At least 4 FAQ questions
checklist.description: The FAQ accordion block in templates/index.json has at least 4 '_accordion-row' blocks

checklist.name: Full homepage structure
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains all expected parts of the Horizon homepage: a 'hero' section, two 'custom-liquid' anchors, and 'section' containers for how-it-works, tiers, recent drops, testimonials, FAQ (with an 'accordion' block), and email capture (with an 'email-signup' block)

checklist.name: Both files valid JSON
checklist.description: Both templates/index.json and templates/product.subscription.json are valid JSON parseable without errors
